hypotheses.title: Cryo-EM 3D Classification of P. aeruginosa OMV Populations Reveals Discrete Cargo-Defined Subclasses
hypotheses.concerns: Discrete vs continuous heterogeneity unclear. Should be framed as measurement test.

hypotheses.title: Subtomogram Averaging of OMV Budding Sites Reveals Conserved Protein Architecture at Membrane Scission
hypotheses.concerns: Sample size ambitious. Null result (no protein collar) is informative.

hypotheses.title: CryoDRGN Reveals Conformational Gating in OmpA That Controls OMV-Luminal Cargo Access
hypotheses.kill_reason: OmpA at 35 kDa is below cryoDRGN resolution limit (~100 kDa minimum). Cargo gating model is mechanism fabrication with zero literature support. Nanodisc removes essential biological context.

hypotheses.title: 3DVA of T6SS Components Reveals Membrane-Piercing Cargo Injection Mechanism
hypotheses.kill_reason: Geometric impossibility: T6SS fires inward from cytoplasm through inner membrane; OMVs bud outward from outer membrane. Injection direction and membrane topology are incompatible.

hypotheses.title: Cryo-EM Classification of OMV Lipid Asymmetry Identifies LPS O-antigen Length as Primary Sorting Signal
hypotheses.concerns: LPS-OMV connection partially known. Corona measurement technically unreliable. Novelty reduced.

hypotheses.title: Cryo-ET Reveals OMP Barrel Clustering at Polar Budding Sites as Cargo Selection Mechanism
hypotheses.concerns: Individual barrel resolution at edge of cryo-ET. Causation direction unclear.

critic_questions: Can cryo-EM resolve continuous vs discrete OMV heterogeneity, and what statistical framework would distinguish biological classes from clustering artifacts?
What alternative cargo sorting mechanisms (periplasmic chaperones, inner membrane export coupling) could explain selective enrichment beyond OMP arrangement and LPS domains?
For subtomogram averaging of budding sites: what minimum particle count is needed for 3 nm resolution?
How would you validate cryo-EM findings orthogonally — cryo-CLEM, immuno-EM, or genetic knockouts?
